name: gmail_imap
description: Neural access to emails via IMAP. Allows listing, reading, and searching messages in Gmail and other compatible providers.

app_password.description: 16-character App Password (generated in your Google account security settings).

action.description: Action to perform: 'list' for the most recent emails or 'search' to find by sender or subject.

query.description: Search term (e.g., 'FROM google' or 'SUBJECT report'). Optional for 'list'.
